Table of Contents

Interface IVector3D

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to 3D vector properties and operations.

[Guid("B3FA5971-ADA3-11D2-9FAE-00C04F8ECE3D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IVector3D : IVector

Properties

Azimuth

The vector's azimuth angle in radians.

double Azimuth { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ComponentByIndex[int] 

double ComponentByIndex[int componentIndex] { get; set; }

Parameters

componentIndex int

Property Value

double

Dimension 

int Dimension { get; }

Property Value

int

Inclination

The vector's inclination in radians.

double Inclination { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsEmpty 

bool IsEmpty { get; }

Property Value

bool

Magnitude 

double Magnitude { get; set; }

Property Value

double

XComponent

The vector's X component.

double XComponent { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

YComponent

The vector's Y component.

double YComponent { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ZComponent

The vector's Z component.

double ZComponent { get; set; }

double

Returns

double

Move(double, double, double)

Move the vector by adding a shift value to each component.

void Move(double dx, double dy, double dz)

Parameters

dx double
dy double
dz double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Normalize() 

void Normalize()

PolarMove(double, double, double)

Modify the vector by adding to its polar components. Angles are in radians.

void PolarMove(double dAzimuth, double dInclination, double dRadius)

Parameters

dAzimuth double
dInclination double
dRadius double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PolarQuery(out double, out double, out double)

Get the vector's polar components. Angles are in radians.

void PolarQuery(out double Azimuth, out double Inclination, out double radiusLength)

Parameters

Azimuth double
Inclination double
radiusLength double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PolarSet(double, double, double)

Set the vector using polar components. Angles are in radians.

void PolarSet(double Azimuth, double Inclination, double radiusLength)

Parameters

Azimuth double
Inclination double
radiusLength double

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryComponents(out double, out double, out double)

Get the values of the vector's components.

void QueryComponents(out double dx, out double dy, out double dz)

Parameters

dx double
dy double
dz double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Rotate(double, IVector3D) 

void Rotate(double Angle, IVector3D axis)

Parameters

Angle double
axis IVector3D

void Scale(double ScaleFactor)

Parameters

ScaleFactor double

dz double
